name: Banzai Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Melted butter or peanut oil
3 Jalapeno peppers, serrano peppers, or Thai peppers, seeded and minced
1 Red bell pepper, seeded and minced
1 teaspoon Habanero sauce (or 1 favorite red hot pepper sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter or heat the peanut oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chili peppers and garlic to the pan. Sauté for 2 to 3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in the coconut milk, peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, sesame oil, honey, and habanero sauce (or red hot pepper sauce). Mix well.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for an additional minute.
5. Remove from heat and transfer the sauce to a serving bowl.
6. Serve with grilled chicken, fish, or lamb, or serve as a vegetable dip.
